tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies Admin API credentials and connectivity.

tools.name: mca-status
tools.description: Get status of all running MCA processes. Shows appId, status, tool count, idle time, and restart count for each MCA.

tools.name: mca-kill
tools.description: Kill a specific MCA process by appId. The process will be restarted on next use.

appId.description: The appId of the MCA to kill (e.g., 'app:mca-teros-bash-system')

tools.name: mca-cleanup
tools.description: Trigger cleanup of inactive MCA processes. Kills MCAs that have been idle for too long.

tools.name: apps-list
tools.description: List all installed apps (MCA instances) with their configuration.

tools.name: agent-access-list
tools.description: List all agent app access grants. Shows which agents have access to which apps.

tools.name: catalog-list
tools.description: List all MCAs in the catalog (available MCAs that can be installed).
